{{CargoOrgan
|name=Infernal Eye
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10678
|idx=35
|description=To gaze is to incinerate — rays seething with the wrath of endless purgatory reduce all in sight to a wasteland of fire and ash.
|skill=Before round start, obtain inferno power, next attack dealing DMG equal to 163%!
|hp=2412
|def=158
|atk=110
|rush=122
|gene1=Earth DMG +60
|gene2=Per 5 Apostles defeated, {race} ATK +30
Apostles Defeated: 15/15
|gene3=Wind RES +60
|gene4=Snail Arena, Total Power Checks -4%
|gene7=Snail Arena, Total Power Checks -4% (Awakened)
|}}
